body_txt: See that ridiculous hairstyle? Turns out it's hereditary. Most of the time, it's an Improbable Hairstyle and often a subtrope of Anime Hair . It is also a type of Strong Family Resemblance . For a similar trope that may overlap, but deals with hair color rather than style, see Hair Color Spoiler . May be part of Generation Xerox . Hair as Cultural Identity and Hollywood Genetics may apply as well.
